use_cases: Accepting terms and conditions or privacy policy agreements
Selecting multiple options from a settings or preferences panel
Toggling individual features or filters on and off
Marking tasks or items as complete in a checklist interface
Obtaining user consent for notifications or marketing communications
ai_summary: A minimalist checkbox component built on Radix UI primitives with full accessibility support. Features standard checked/unchecked states, keyboard focus indicators, and disabled functionality. Used as a fundamental form input element across virtually any application requiring boolean or multiple selection inputs.
